title: XPeng Q3 2023 Earnings Preview: Analyst Expectations and Performance Outlook
text: XPeng reported Q3 2023 results on November 15, 2023, before market open. Analysts projected a loss per share of 72 cents, representing significant deterioration from year-ago results. Earnings ESP was 0.00% with a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell rating). The company showed mixed track record with beats twice and misses twice over trailing four quarters with average negative surprise of 11.91%. Revenue pressure persisted with revenues declining to $698.2 million from $1,110.2 million year-over-year in Q2 2023. Falling revenues and thinning margins were likely to persist in the third quarter and adversely impact performance. Gross margin turned negative at -3.9% in Q2, down sharply from positive 10.9% in the prior year period. Research spending rose 8.1% to $188.9 million, reflecting development costs for new vehicle models that pressured near-term profitability.
